pcolormesh-basic: Gouraud shading not implemented: CL uses flat-color quad approximation instead of smooth interpolation. Permanent limitation. PNG=0.648, SVG=0.661, PDF=0.673
pcolormesh: Gouraud shading not implemented: CL uses flat-color quad approximation instead of smooth interpolation. Permanent limitation. PNG=0.694, SVG=0.698, PDF=0.717
color-cycle: Minor color rendering delta between CL and Python color cycling. PNG=0.946 (just below 0.95 threshold). Permanent difference in color sequence generation.
hexbin-basic: Hexbin grid algorithm differs: CL uses dy=dx*sqrt(3) while matplotlib uses different grid spacing. Produces different hex positions, counts, and colors for same data. Deterministic data used. PNG=0.52. Permanent limitation requiring hexbin algorithm rewrite.
